metadata.title: Image Easy — Multi-model AI image generator with signup credits
metadata.description: Image Easy is a multi-model AI image generator with GPT Image 2, Seedream 4.5, Nano Banana Pro, monthly and annual plans, and limited-time signup credits.
metadata.ogDescription: Multi-model AI image generator with limited-time signup credits.

home.lead: Image Easy brings {models} into one focused interface. {noNoise} Sign up for free credits and start generating images.
home.leadNoNoise: No tab-hopping across model sites, no cluttered dashboards.
home.section1Body: Text-to-image, image editing, product visuals, and complex scenes — focused on what is actually {em}.
home.section2Body: Choose a model, write your prompt, click {em}. Results are saved automatically to your creations.
home.section3Body: Sign up to claim limited-time free credits. When you need more generation capacity, choose a monthly or annual subscription plan.
home.footerCopyright: Copyright © 2026 Image Easy Inc. All rights reserved.
home.limitedBody: New users can claim limited-time free credits. Different models and resolutions use different credits, failed generations are refunded automatically, and monthly or annual plans are available when you need more capacity.
home.modelCompareBody: GPT Image 2 is strong for realism and text rendering, Seedream 4.5 handles high-fidelity complex scenes, and Nano Banana Pro focuses on consistency and 4K output.
home.step1Text: Choose a text-to-image or image editing model, then adjust aspect ratio, resolution, and related settings.
home.step2Text: Write a natural-language prompt and see the estimated credit cost before generating.
home.step3Text: Results are saved to your creations for review, reuse, and download.
home.useCasesLead: Image Easy is built for creators and small teams that need to compare model output, keep generation history, and control costs.
home.useCase1Body: Generate product scenes, social creatives, and campaign images while comparing model styles.
home.useCase2Body: Explore people, styles, composition, and visual directions with prompts and reference images.
home.useCase3Body: Upload references for local redraws, restyling, scene changes, or more precise visual corrections.
home.faq1A: New users can claim limited-time free credits, and generation uses credits based on model and resolution. Choose a monthly or annual plan when you need more capacity.
home.faq2Q: What happens when free credits run out?
home.faq2A: You can continue with a monthly or annual subscription plan. Each plan grants credits monthly.
home.faq3Q: Which AI image models can I use?
home.faq3A: Image Easy currently supports GPT Image 2, Seedream 4.5, and Nano Banana Pro, with more models planned.

pricing.metaDescription: Sign up for limited-time free credits and see transparent credit usage by model and resolution. Monthly and annual plans are available.
pricing.title: Choose the plan for your creative work.
pricing.lead: New users can claim limited-time free credits; choose monthly or annual plans when you need more generation capacity.
pricing.planLine1: New users can claim free credits to try multi-model image generation.
pricing.planLine2: If paid plans are not configured yet, this page shows signup credits and credit usage rules.
pricing.detailsBody1: Subscription credits can be used across the current multi-model AI image generation workspace.
pricing.detailsBody2: Generation uses credits based on the selected model and resolution. Failed generations are refunded automatically.
pricing.checkoutSuccess: Payment received. Your credits will appear after Stripe confirms the checkout.
pricing.checkoutCancel: Checkout was canceled. No credits were added.
pricing.checkoutSignInRequired: Please sign in before buying credits.
pricing.costTableLead: These are the current credit costs for one generated image. Failed generations are refunded.

privacy.metaDescription: A plain-language privacy summary for Image Easy.
privacy.title: Privacy at launch
privacy.lead: This page summarizes what Image Easy handles when you use the service.
privacy.summaryUpload: Users upload images and prompts to Image Easy.
privacy.summaryProvider: Image Easy sends prompts and required image URLs to third-party AI model providers through kie.ai.
privacy.summaryStorage: Image Easy stores account data, generation history, prompts, uploaded images, and generated image URLs.
privacy.betaBody1: Generation requests need enough prompt and image information to produce the requested output.
privacy.betaBody2: Do not upload images or prompts that you are not comfortable using with this service.

terms.metaDescription: Basic terms for using Image Easy.
terms.title: Terms of use
terms.lead: Use Image Easy responsibly and only with content you have the right to use.
terms.summaryRights: Users are responsible for rights to uploaded images and generated outputs.
terms.summaryProhibited: Users may not generate illegal, abusive, or rights-infringing content.
terms.summaryRemoval: Image Easy may remove access or content that violates these terms.
terms.betaBody: Features, limits, model availability, and policies may change as Image Easy improves.

contact.metaDescription: How to contact the Image Easy team.
contact.title: Contact the Image Easy team
contact.lead: We keep support direct so generation issues and account questions can be handled quickly.
contact.supportBody: For launch support, email the Image Easy team at support@image-easy.com.
contact.supportDetails: When reporting a generation issue, include the account email, approximate time, model name, and a short description of what happened.

about.metaDescription: Image Easy is a focused multi-model AI image generation workspace.
about.title: About Image Easy
about.lead: Image Easy is a focused multi-model AI image generation workspace.
about.workspaceBody1: The product brings text-to-image and image-to-image models into one direct workflow for prompts, reference images, and saved results.
about.workspaceBody2: The goal is to make model choice simple without adding dashboards, token jargon, or unnecessary setup.
about.betaBody: Image Easy is built to keep model choice, prompts, reference images, and saved results in one practical workflow.

auth.loginLead: Sign in to start generating images. Free credits are waiting for you.

create.lead: Choose a model, write a prompt, adjust parameters, and generate your image.
create.promptPlaceholderI2I: How should the references be transformed?
create.promptPlaceholderT2I: Describe your subject in plain language…
create.errorRequiresImage: This model requires at least one reference image.
create.uploaderCount: {count} / {max} · jpg, png, webp · up to 20 MB
create.uploaderHint: {max} max · jpg, png, webp · up to 20 MB
create.errorInsufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this generation. Choose a plan to continue creating.

descriptions.gpt-image-2-text-to-image: OpenAI's latest GPT-Image-2 — industry-leading text rendering and photorealism.
descriptions.gpt-image-2-image-to-image: Use GPT-Image-2 to re-render, restyle, or change the scene of a reference image.
descriptions.seedream-4-5-text-to-image: ByteDance Seedream 4.5 — supports 4K high-fidelity, complex scenes.
descriptions.seedream-4-5-edit: Seedream 4.5 image-to-image — preserves subject identity for precise retouching.
descriptions.nano-banana-pro: Google Gemini 3.0 Pro Image — multi-object consistency, 4K rendering.

archive.emptyText: No creations yet. Generate your first image when you are ready.
archive.emptyFilter: No creations for this model yet.
archive.printCount: {count, plural, =0 {No creations yet} one {# creation} other {# creations}}
archive.discardConfirm: Delete this creation from your history?

billing.title: Billing & usage
billing.lead: View your current plan, credit balance, usage history, and payment records.
billing.portalFailed: Could not open subscription management. Please try again.
billing.paymentFailedBody: Your subscription payment failed. Update your payment method to keep future credit grants active.
